'''wonalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:shafty|shafty]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shafty|shafty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wonalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wonalithi|wonalithi]] || [[word:wonaliji|wonaliji]] || [[word:wonalishi|wonalishi]] || [[word:wonaliki|wonaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wonaluthuthu|wonaluthuthu]] || [[word:wonalujuju|wonalujuju]] || [[word:wonalushushu|wonalushushu]] || [[word:wonalukuku|wonalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wonaluthu|wonaluthu]] || [[word:wonaluju|wonaluju]] || [[word:wonalushu|wonalushu]] || [[word:wonaluku|wonaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wonalufthuf|wonalufthuf]] || [[word:wonalufjuf|wonalufjuf]] || [[word:wonalufshuf|wonalufshuf]] || [[word:wonalufkuf|wonalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wonalethe|wonalethe]] || [[word:wonaleje|wonaleje]] || [[word:wonaleshe|wonaleshe]] || [[word:wonaleke|wonaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wonalothotho|wonalothotho]] || [[word:wonalojojo|wonalojojo]] || [[word:wonaloshosho|wonaloshosho]] || [[word:wonalokoko|wonalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wonalotho|wonalotho]] || [[word:wonalojo|wonalojo]] || [[word:wonalosho|wonalosho]] || [[word:wonaloko|wonaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wonalofthof|wonalofthof]] || [[word:wonalofjof|wonalofjof]] || [[word:wonalofshof|wonalofshof]] || [[word:wonalofkof|wonalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfthÃŸf|wonalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfjÃŸf|wonalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfshÃŸf|wonalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfkÃŸf|wonalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wonalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wonalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wonalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wonalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfthÃŸf|wonalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfjÃŸf|wonalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfshÃŸf|wonalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfkÃŸf|wonalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfthÃŸf|wonalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfjÃŸf|wonalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfshÃŸf|wonalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wonalÃŸfkÃŸf|wonalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wonalÃḊthÃḊ|wonalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wonalÃḊjÃḊ|wonalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wonalÃḊshÃḊ|wonalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wonalÃḊkÃḊ|wonalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wonalathatha|wonalathatha]] || [[word:wonalajaja|wonalajaja]] || [[word:wonalashasha|wonalashasha]] || [[word:wonalakaka|wonalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wonalatha|wonalatha]] || [[word:wonalaja|wonalaja]] || [[word:wonalasha|wonalasha]] || [[word:wonalaka|wonalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wonalafthaf|wonalafthaf]] || [[word:wonalafjaf|wonalafjaf]] || [[word:wonalafshaf|wonalafshaf]] || [[word:wonalafkaf|wonalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wonalasha|wonalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wonalshÃḋsha|wonalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wonalrosha|wonalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wonalmusha|wonalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wonalyasha|wonalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowonalnkshÃḋsha|gowonalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowonalnkrosha|gowonalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowonalnkmusha|gowonalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowonalnkyasha|gowonalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wonanalasha|wonanalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wonanalshÃḋsha|wonanalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wonanalrosha|wonanalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wonanalmusha|wonanalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wonanalyasha|wonanalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowonanalnkshÃḋsha|gowonanalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowonanalnkrosha|gowonanalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowonanalnkmusha|gowonanalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowonanalnkyasha|gowonanalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wenÃḊlasha|wenÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wenÃḊlshÃḋsha|wenÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wenÃḊlrosha|wenÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wenÃḊlmusha|wenÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wenÃḊlyasha|wenÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowenÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|gowenÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowenÃḊlnkrosha|gowenÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowenÃḊlnkmusha|gowenÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowenÃḊlnkyasha|gowenÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wonfalasha|wonfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wonfalshÃḋsha|wonfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wonfalrosha|wonfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wonfalmusha|wonfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wonfalyasha|wonfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowonfalnkshÃḋsha|gowonfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowonfalnkrosha|gowonfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowonfalnkmusha|gowonfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowonfalnkyasha|gowonfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
